arts.ttl: Fiorentina Explore Zaniolo Transfer from Atalanta as Winter Window Closes
arts.sum: As the winter transfer window nears its end, Fiorentina are making significant moves in the Serie A market. Fresh from securing Pablo Marì from Monza, the Viola are now setting their sights on bolstering their offensive lineup. The post Fiorentina Explore Zaniolo Transfer from Atalanta as Winter Window Closes appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Barcelona have begun ramping up the pressure on Ansu Fati to depart the club before the month is out. That’s according to Diario Sport,…

arts.ttl: Rashford offered new Man Utd escape route after Barcelona hitch
arts.sum: Barcelona remain unable to sign Marcus Rashford, which has emboldened Al-Ahli to make a fresh approach for the Manchester United outcast, according to a report. Indeed, Amorim seemingly hammered the final nail in Rashford's Man Utd coffin recently when he said that he would rather play his 63-year-old goalkeeper coach than the England international.

arts.ttl: Szczesny Opens Up About Juventus Exit and Barcelona Move
arts.sum: Former Juventus goalkeeper Wojciech Szczesny candidly shared his thoughts on his departure from the Italian giants and his surprising move to Barcelona in an interview with Gazzetta dello Sport. The Polish shot-stopper, who made 252 appearances for Juventus between 2017 and 2024, expressed his surprise at both his own exit and that of his former teammate Danilo. The post Szczesny Opens Up About Juventus Exit and Barcelona Move appeared first on FootItalia.com.
